summary: DHH announces he's heading to Chicago for the sold-out Building of Basecamp 5 workshop. While the workshop itself is full, he points readers to a Chicago Area Ruby Group meetup on April 23rd as an alternative way to connect. Notable Ruby community figures like Chad Fowler and Curt Hibbs will also attend. The post is a brief, casual invitation to Chicago-area developers to come talk Rails and Ruby over pizza.
key_points: The Building of Basecamp 5 workshop sold out in just one week, showing strong early demand for Rails-related education
The Chicago Area Ruby Group organized a community meetup as an accessible alternative to the sold-out workshop
Prominent Ruby figures like Chad Fowler and Curt Hibbs were already part of the growing Rails community ecosystem
money_quotes: The workshop sold out in a mere week, but there's still a chance to meet up and talk Rails, Ruby, and other good stuff.
If you're into the whole nerds meeting to talk nerd about nerdy stuff. I know you are.
key_insight: Even in Rails' earliest days, community demand was outstripping supply, with workshops selling out in a week and local meetups filling the gap.
